name: qp_qce_5000
drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0()
then
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF1()));
end
rule "R3"
salience -6
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f0 >= 1.5, $b3_0_0 : f0)
    T1(f0 not in (9, -5), f0 < $b3_0_0, $b3_1_0 : f0)
then
    delete($p3_0);
end
query TCr(long $a, long $b)
    ( RelR(src == $a, dst == $b) )
    or
    ( RelR($m, $b;) and TCr($a, $m;) and MarkR(node == $m) )
end

rule QR0 salience -8
when
    T1(f0 > -2)
    ?TCr($qr0_x0, $qr0_x1;)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, $qr0_x1, $qr0_x0, "beta", true));
end
rule QRtwin
when
    T1(f0 > -2)
    ?TCr($qr0_x0, $qr0_x1;)
then
    insert(new QOut(2, 0, 0.0, "t", false));
end
